expectations.text: Uses past tense for completed actions
Uses passive voice appropriately for Methods section
expectations.evidence: Uses active voice 'We conducted', 'We used', 'We analyzed'

expectations.text: Preserves methodological details (sample size, design, tools)
expectations.evidence: All details preserved (but no rewriting done)

expectations.text: No more than 5 consecutive words match the original

expectations.evidence: Original tone preserved (but no rewriting done)
